endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all the available EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph services operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph/services
endpoints.description: Returns all the resources of a particular type belonging to a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph/services
endpoints.description: Returns all the resources of a particular type belonging to a resource group
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph/services/{resourceName}
endpoints.description: Returns a EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph service specified by the parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph/services/{resourceName}
endpoints.description: Creates a EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph Service. EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph Service is a resource group wide resource type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph/services/{resourceName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph Service from the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.EnterpriseKnowledgeGraph/services/{resourceName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
